registerForm.title: Register
registerForm.desc: Create your account. It's free and only takes a minute
loginForm.title: Sign In
loginForm.desc: Enter your credentials to access your account
Title must be at least 3 characters: Title must be at least 3 characters
Title must be less than 60 characters: Title must be less than 60 characters
Description must be at least 4 character: Description must be at least 4 characters
Enter at least 1 character to search: Enter at least 1 character to search
Username must be at least 3 characters: Username must be at least 3 characters
Username must be at most 20 characters: Username must be at most 20 characters
Password must be at least 6 characters: Password must be at least 6 characters
Password must be at most 20 characters: Password must be at most 20 characters

post.locked.commentsDisabled: Subscribe to view and post comments.
sub.renewNote: Your access will be extended past {{date}} for the selected period.
sub.upgradeNote: You keep the current period (until {{date}}). You'll be charged the prorated difference right now.
sub.downgradeNote: Your current tier stays active until {{date}}. The new (lower) tier will be available when you renew.
tier.priceLocked: Tier price cannot be edited after creation. To use a different price, create a new tier.
tier.deleteConfirmText: Delete the "{{title}}" tier? Posts attached to this tier will become free.
tier.deleteBlockedDesc: The "{{title}}" tier has active paying subscribers. You can't remove it while someone is subscribed. Wait until their paid periods end, or ask them to cancel.
tier.priceDuplicate: You already have a tier with this price. Tier prices must be unique.
